text.p: Thank you for your msg. We have a summer programme for students who had deficiencies in the results and the exams for first semester summer starts on the 22nd of August.There is a seminar I intend attending but I am not really clear with the theme.No sub themme was given.

Sir, I need your assistance inorder to carve out a topic. It is an international conference with the theme- Learning, Transparency, Responsibility and Colaboration. The conference is under the auspices of International Language Testing Association.
